theme.description: A dark, highly technical command-center. The UI recedes into deep void blacks and stark architectural lines, allowing the hyper-realistic fictional content (videos, characters) to act as the primary visual light source. Functional brutalism meets cinematic studio.

surfaces.inputs: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#FF3B30] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30]/50 rounded-none text-white transition-colors

layout_strategy.general: The 'Control Room' Grid protocol. Dense, edge-to-edge layouts using collapsible left-sidebars and heavily modular widget zones.
layout_strategy.spacing: Tight spacing for dashboard widgets (gap-4, p-4), but generous internal padding (p-8) for content viewer panes.
layout_strategy.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-0 border-collapse. Utilize 1px white/10 borders on grid children to create a technical skeleton.
layout_strategy.sidebar: Fixed vertical navigation, tracking active states with a solid #FF3B30 left border indicator and white text.
layout_strategy.main_content: Split-pane layout. Left: Technical parameter controls (forms, sliders). Right: Immersive cinematic preview canvas.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF574D]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5. All buttons MUST have data-testid.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized for dark mode. Remove soft radii (rounded-none). Use JetBrains Mono for data readouts and parameter inputs.
components.cards: Zero shadow by default. Rely on 1px white/10 borders. Hover states trigger a subtle lift and border glow.
components.tabs: Minimalist technical tabs. Active tab has a bright bottom border (#FF3B30) and text-white. Inactive tabs are grayed out.
components.sliders: Essential for AI generation parameters. Thin track with a sharp rectangular thumb.
components.status_indicators: Small glowing dots (e.g., red for recording, green for ready) with accompanying JetBrains Mono labels.

images.description: Dark podcast studio microphone setup. Use in the Studio Engine preview.
Fantasy alien landscape. Use as placeholder for the World Engine generated outputs.
Dark dramatic portrait. Use as a placeholder for the Character Engine.
Abstract control panel background. Use for loading states, empty data views, or login screens.

motion_and_interactions.general: Micro-interactions focus on precision. Snappy, fast transitions. No bouncy animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must explicitly set hover:text-white. Use subtle background tint shifts.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use technical loaders. Indeterminate linear progress bars (h-1 bg-[#FF3B30] running across the top edge) rather than generic circular spinners.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building an internal technical dashboard for AI podcast generation. Do NOT build a marketing landing page.
Implement a persistent left sidebar with navigation for the multi-layered engines: World Engine, Character Engine, Scripts, Studio, Video Generation.
Ensure global import of fonts 'Chivo', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts.
Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue. Use #FF3B30 (Signal Red) for primary actions to simulate a recording/studio aesthetic.
Apply 'Grid Borders' surface strategy: Use border-r and border-b on grid items to expose the layout skeleton.
Strip Shadcn components of soft radii (use rounded-none) and heavy shadows. Flat and technical.
Integrate provided images for previews. Use object-cover within sharp-edge containers. Do not use random placeholder services.
MANDATORY: Add 'data-testid' attributes to EVERY interactive element using role-based kebab-case naming.
